title: Complete Interactions API Tool Turn and Provider Context Circulation · Behavior Case: Exactly Once Dispatch
summary: The application reads only output text, misses function-call steps, executes twice, sends a result without call identity, drops provider context, and reports success before final model output. Predict authority, model and API behavior, state, tool effects, budgets, privacy, safety, accessibility, failure, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the exactly once dispatch increment in one complete correlated Gemini tool turn. Learners progress through pr…
objectives: Reserve call identity before execution and reconcile retries so one logical function call cannot create duplicate effects.
Classify model output, function call, function result, built-in tool, retrieval, safety, error, and terminal interaction steps exhaustively.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-ai-agent-python cumulative safe evaluated AI agent portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python interaction, tool, policy, state, memory,
evaluation, telemetry, and recovery models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only.
Provider APIs, Gemini models, native google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic, HTTP, credentials,
host files, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, cost, privacy review,
and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentPolicy:
    stakeholder_task_id: str
    allowed_tool_names: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_steps: int = 12
    maximum_tool_calls: int = 8
    approval_required_for_writes: bool = True


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentEvidence:
    revision: str
    model_config_digest: str
    policy_digest: str
    evaluation_digest: str
    recovery_drill_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Safe evaluated Python AI agent portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Worked focus: agentpy-exactly-once-dispatch — Reserve call identity before execution and reconcile retries so one logical function call cannot create duplicate effects.
# Evidence: agentpy-worked-agentpy-single-tool-turn-5
# Competency: agentpy-worked-agentpy-single-tool-turn-5.
# Case 9036: a privacy-minimized nonprofit workflow.
# Operating constraint: last valid checkpoint, audit trail, kill switch, and rollback path must survive failure.
# Changed case: introduce a sensitive action, poisoned memory, leaking log, or computer-use request and deny or pause it.
def worked_agentpy_single_tool_turn_5(model_steps: int = 6, tool_calls: int = 2, tool_results: int = 2, final_outputs: int = 1, lost_provider_context: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked5 = "worked5-5dekrow-9036"
    assert evidence_variant_worked5
    evidence_axes_worked5 = (
        "authorityworked5",
        "interaction9036",
        "tool5dekrow",
        "stateworked59036",
        "evaluation9036worked5",
        "recovery5dekrow9036",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked5)) == 6
    if model_steps < 3 or tool_calls < 1:
        return False, model_steps, "tool-turn-shape"
    if tool_results != tool_calls:
        return False, tool_results, "tool-result-gap"
    if final_outputs != 1:
        return False, final_outputs, "final-output-count"
    if lost_provider_context > 0:
        return False, lost_provider_context, "provider-context-loss"
    assert tool_results == tool_calls and final_outputs == 1
    return True, tool_results, "complete-tool-turn"
